description_long: This is a small, sealed snack package with a vibrant purple background and bold, stylized Japanese text on the front. The packaging features a cartoon mascot with a mustache and glasses, energetically presenting the snack, which appears to be tortilla chips. The lower section of the package displays an image of the chips, surrounded by fiery graphics suggesting a spicy flavor. The bag is made of glossy, flexible plastic, and the top is heat-sealed. The back and sides of the package are less detailed, with the main focus on the colorful front design and branding.
description: A small, glossy purple snack bag with Japanese text, a cartoon mascot, and fiery graphics indicating spicy tortilla chips.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main branding, mascot, and spicy chip graphics with clear Japanese text.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thinness of the bag and the sealed edges, with minimal visible graphics.
description_view_2: Rear view with less detailed graphics, mostly showing the back of the packaging and some text.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slim profile and sealed edge of the bag.
attribute_brand_logo: A cartoon mascot with a mustache and glasses is prominently displayed on the front, surrounded by Japanese text and fiery graphics. The logo is colorful, mainly purple, orange, and white, and located in the upper center of the package.
attribute_flavor_indication: Fiery graphics and the word 'spicy' in English and Japanese, along with an image of tortilla chips, indicate a spicy flavor.
attribute_promotional_graphics: A cartoon mascot with a mustache and glasses is featured on the front, energetically presenting the snack. There is also a comic-style burst graphic with Japanese text, suggesting a promotional or attention-grabbing element.
